title: Benchmarking Nonlinear Oscillators for Grid-Forming Inverter Control

sections.heading: Linked claims
sections.text: Nonlinear oscillator based grid-forming control should be described with explicit oscillator states, amplitude-limiting dynamics, and a clearly defined mapping from oscillator state to inverter voltage or modulation commands.

sections.heading: Current-limit interaction
sections.text: Oscillator-based grid-forming controllers need explicit coordination between oscillator dynamics and inner current limiting so transient stress is bounded during startup and load steps.
